text: vayehi acharey movt yehovshu'a vayishealu beney yiserael bayhva lemor mi ya'aleh-lanu el-hakena'ani batechila lehilachem bov
vayomer yehva yehuda ya'ale hine natati et-haarets beyadov
vayomer yehuda leshime'ovn achiv 'ale iti vegovrali venilachama bakena'ani vehalakheti gam-ani itekha begovralekha vayelekh itov shime'ovn
vaya'al yehuda vayiten yehva et-hakena'ani vehaperizi beyadam vayakum bevezeq 'aseret alafim ish
vayimetseu et-adoni vezeq bevezeq vayilachamu bov vayaku et-hakena'ani veet-haperizi
vayanas adoni vezeq vayiredefu acharayv vayochazu otov vayeqatsetsu et-behonovt yadayv veragelayv
vayomer adoni-vezeq shive'im ׀ melakhim behonovt yedeyhem verageleyhem mequtsatsim hayu melaqetim tachat shulechani kaasher 'asiti ken shilam-li elohim vayeviuhu yerushalaim vayamat sham f
vayilachamu veney-yehuda birushalaim vayilekedu ovtah vayakuha lefi-charev veet-ha'ir shilechu vaesh
veachar yaredu beney yehuda lehilachem bakena'ani yovshev hahar vehanegev vehashefela
vayelekh yehuda el-hakena'ani hayovshev becheverovn veshem-cheverovn lefanim qireyat areba' vayaku et-sheshay veet-achiman veet-talemay
vayelekh misham el-yovshevey devir veshem-devir lefanim qireyat-sefer
vayomer kalev asher-yake et-qireyat-sefer ulekhadah venatati lov et-'akhesa viti leisha
vayilekedah 'ateniel ben-qenaz achi khalev haqaton mimenu vayiten-lov et-'akhesa vitov leisha
vayehi bevovah vatesitehu lisheovl meet-aviha hasade vatitsenach me'al hachamovr vayomer-lah kalev mah-lakh
vatomer lov havah-li verakha ki erets hanegev netatani venatata li gulot mayim vayiten-lah kalev et gulot 'ilit veet gulot tachetit f
uveney qeyni choten moshe 'alu me'ir hatemarim et-beney yehuda midebar yehuda asher benegev 'arad vayelekh vayeshev et-ha'am
vayelekh yehuda et-shime'ovn achiv vayaku et-hakena'ani yovshev tsefat vayacharimu ovtah vayiqera et-shem-ha'ir charema
vayilekod yehuda et-'aza veet-gevulah veet-asheqelovn veet-gevulah veet-'eqerovn veet-gevulah
vayehi yehva et-yehuda vayoresh et-hahar ki lo lehovrish et-yoshevey ha'emeq ki-rekhev barezel lahem
vayitenu lekhalev et-cheverovn kaasher diber moshe vayovresh misham et-shelosha beney ha'anaq
veet-hayevusi yoshev yerushalaim lo hovrishu beney vineyamin vayeshev hayevusi et-beney vineyamin birushalaim 'ad hayovm haze s
vaya'alu veyt-yovsef gam-hem beyt-el vayhva 'imam
vayatiru veyt-yovsef beveyt-el veshem-ha'ir lefanim luz
vayireu hashomerim ish yovtse min-ha'ir vayomeru lov hareenu na et-mevov ha'ir ve'asinu 'imekha chased
vayareem et-mevov ha'ir vayaku et-ha'ir lefi-charev veet-haish veet-kal-mishepachetov shilechu
vayelekh haish erets hachitim vayiven 'ir vayiqera shemah luz hu shemah 'ad hayovm haze f

velo-hovrish menashe et-beyt-shean veet-benovteyha veet-ta'enakh veet-benoteyha veet yoshev kh yoshevey q dovr veet-benovteyha veet-yovshevey yivele'am veet-benoteyha veet-yovshevey megidov veet-benovteyha vayovel hakena'ani lashevet baarets hazot
vayehi ki-chazaq yiserael vayasem et-hakena'ani lamas vehovreysh lo hovrishov s
veeferayim lo hovrish et-hakena'ani hayovshev begazer vayeshev hakena'ani beqirebov begazer f
zevulun lo hovrish et-yovshevey qiterovn veet-yovshevey nahalol vayeshev hakena'ani beqirebov vayiheyu lamas s
asher lo hovrish et-yoshevey 'akov veet-yovshevey tsidovn veet-achelav veet-akheziv veet-cheleba veet-afiq veet-rechov
vayeshev haasheri beqerev hakena'ani yoshevey haarets ki lo hovrishov s
nafetali lo-hovrish et-yoshevey veyt-shemesh veet-yoshevey veyt-'anat vayeshev beqerev hakena'ani yoshevey haarets veyoshevey veyt-shemesh uveyt 'anat hayu lahem lamas s
vayilechatsu haemori et-beney-dan hahara ki-lo netanov laredet la'emeq
vayovel haemori lashevet behar-cheres beayalovn uvesha'alevim vatikhebad yad beyt-yovsef vayiheyu lamas
ugevul haemori mima'ale 'aqerabim mehasela' vama'ela f
vaya'al maleakhe-yehva min-hagilegal el-habokhim f vayomer a'ale etekhem mimitserayim vaavi etekhem el-haarets asher nisheba'eti laavoteykhem vaomar lo-afer beriti itekhem le'ovlam
veatem lo-tikheretu verit leyovshevey haarets hazot mizebechovteyhem titotsun velo-shema'etem beqoli mah-zot 'asitem
vegam amareti lo-agaresh ovtam mipeneykhem vehayu lakhem letsidim veloheyhem yiheyu lakhem lemovqesh
vayehi kedaber maleakh yehva et-hadevarim haele el-kal-beney yiserael vayiseu ha'am et-qovlam vayiveku
vayiqereu shem-hamaqovm hahu bokhim vayizebechu-sham layhva f
vayeshalach yehovshu'a et-ha'am vayelekhu veney-yiserael ish lenachalatov lareshet et-haarets
vaya'avedu ha'am et-yehva kol yemey yehovshu'a vekhol ׀ yemey hazeqenim asher heerikhu yamim acharey yehovshu'a asher rau et kal-ma'ase yehva hagadovl asher 'asa leyiserael
vayamat yehovshu'a bin-nun 'eved yehva ben-mea va'eser shanim
vayiqeberu ovtov bigevul nachalatov betimenat-cheres behar eferayim mitsefovn lehar-ga'ash
vegam kal-hadovr hahu neesefu el-avovtayv vayaqam dovr acher achareyhem asher lo-yade'u et-yehva vegam et-hama'ase asher 'asa leyiserael s
vaya'asu veney-yiserael et-hara' be'eyney yehva vaya'avedu et-habe'alim
vaya'azevu et-yehva ׀ elohey avovtam hamovtsi ovtam meerets mitserayim vayelekhu acharey ׀ elohim acherim meelohey ha'amim asher sevivovteyhem vayishetachavu lahem vayakhe'isu et-yehva ׃
vaya'azevu et-yehva vaya'avedu laba'al vela'ashetarovt
vayichar-af yehva beyiserael vayitenem beyad-shosim vayashosu ovtam vayimekerem beyad ovyeveyhem misaviv velo-yakhelu 'ovd la'amod lifeney ovyeveyhem
bekhol ׀ asher yatseu yad-yehva hayetah-bam lera'a kaasher diber yehva vekhaasher nisheba' yehva lahem vayetser lahem meod
vayaqem yehva shofetim vayovshi'um miyad shoseyhem
vegam el-shofeteyhem lo shame'u ki zanu acharey elohim acherim vayishetachavu lahem saru maher min-haderekh asher halekhu avovtam lishemo'a mitseot-yehva lo-'asu khen
vekhi-heqim yehva ׀ lahem shofetim vehaya yehva 'im-hashofet vehovshi'am miyad oyeveyhem kol yemey hashovfet ki-yinachem yehva minaaqatam mipeney lochatseyhem vedochaqeyhem
vehaya ׀ bemovt hashovfet yashuvu vehishechitu meavovtam lalekhet acharey elohim acherim le'avedam ulehishetachaot lahem lo hipilu mima'aleleyhem umidarekam haqasha
vayichar-af yehva beyiserael vayomer ya'an asher 'averu hagovy haze et-beriti asher tsiviti et-avovtam velo shame'u leqovli
gam-ani lo ovsif lehovrish ish mipeneyhem min-hagovyim asher-'azav yehovshu'a vayamot
lema'an nasovt bam et-yiserael hashomerim hem et-derekh yehva lalekhet bam kaasher shameru avovtam im-lo
vayanach yehva et-hagovyim haele levileti hovrisham maher velo netanam beyad-yehovshu'a f
veele hagovyim asher hinicha yehva lenasovt bam et-yiserael et kal-asher lo-yade'u et kal-milechamovt kena'an
raq lema'an da'at dorovt beney-yiserael lelamedam milechama raq asher-lefanim lo yeda'um
chameshet ׀ sareney felishetim vekhal-hakena'ani vehatsidoni vehachivi yoshev har halevanovn mehar ba'al cheremovn 'ad levov chamat
vayiheyu lenasovt bam et-yiserael lada'at hayisheme'u et-mitseot yehva asher-tsiva et-avovtam beyad-moshe
uveney yiserael yashevu beqerev hakena'ani hachiti vehaemori vehaperizi vehachivi vehayevusi
vayiqechu et-benovteyhem lahem lenashim veet-benovteyhem natenu liveneyhem vaya'avedu et-eloheyhem f
vaya'asu veney-yiserael et-hara' be'eyney yehva vayishekechu et-yehva eloheyhem vaya'avedu et-habe'alim veet-haasherovt
vayichar-af yehva beyiserael vayimekerem beyad kushan rishe'atayim melekh aram naharayim vaya'avedu veney-yiserael et-kushan rishe'atayim shemone shanim
vayize'aqu veney-yiserael el-yehva vayaqem yehva movshi'a liveney yiserael vayovshi'em et 'ateniel ben-qenaz achi khalev haqaton mimenu
vatehi 'alayv rucha-yehva vayishepot et-yiserael vayetse lamilechama vayiten yehva beyadov et-kushan rishe'atayim melekh aram vata'az yadov 'al kushan rishe'atayim
vatisheqot haarets areba'im shana vayamat 'ateniel ben-qenaz f
vayosifu beney yiserael la'asovt hara' be'eyney yehva vayechazeq yehva et-'egelovn melekhe-movav 'al-yiserael 'al ki-'asu et-hara' be'eyney yehva
vayeesof elayv et-beney 'amovn va'amaleq vayelekh vayakh et-yiserael vayireshu et-'ir hatemarim
vaya'avedu veney-yiserael et-'egelovn melekhe-movav shemovne 'esere shana s
vayize'aqu veney-yiserael el-yehva vayaqem yehva lahem movshi'a et-ehud ben-gera ben-hayemini ish iter yad-yeminov vayishelechu veney-yiserael beyadov minecha le'egelovn melekh movav
vaya'as lov ehud cherev velah sheney feyovt gomed arekah vayachegor ovtah mitachat lemadayv 'al yerekh yeminov
vayaqerev et-haminecha le'egelovn melekh movav ve'egelovn ish bari meod
vayehi kaasher kila lehaqeriv et-haminecha vayeshalach et-ha'am noseey haminecha
vehu shav min-hapesilim asher et-hagilegal vayomer devar-seter li eleykha hamelekh vayomer has vayetseu me'alayv kal-ha'omedim 'alayv
veehud ׀ ba elayv vehu-yoshev ba'aliyat hameqera asher-lov levadov vayomer ehud devar-elohim li eleykha vayaqam me'al hakise
vayishelach ehud et-yad semolov vayiqach et-hacherev me'al yerekh yeminov vayiteqa'eha bevitenov
vayavo gam-hanitsav achar halahav vayisegor hachelev be'ad halahav ki lo shalaf hacherev mibitenov vayetse hapareshedona
vayetse ehud hamisederovna vayisegor daletovt ha'aliya ba'adov vena'al
vehu yatsa va'avadayv bau vayireu vehine daletovt ha'aliya ne'ulovt vayomeru akh mesikh hu et-ragelayv bachadar hameqera
vayachilu 'ad-bovsh vehine eynenu fotecha daletovt ha'aliya vayiqechu et-hamafetecha vayifetachu vehine adoneyhem nofel aretsa met
veehud nimelat 'ad hitemahemeham vehu 'avar et-hapesilim vayimalet hase'irata
vayehi bevovov vayiteqa' bashovfar behar eferayim vayeredu 'imov veney-yiserael min-hahar vehu lifeneyhem
vayomer alehem ridefu acharay ki-natan yehva et-oyeveykhem et-movav beyedekhem vayeredu acharayv vayilekedu et-ma'eberovt hayareden lemovav velo-natenu ish la'avor
vayaku et-movav ba'et hahi ka'aseret alafim ish kal-shamen vekhal-ish chayil velo nimelat ish
vatikana' movav bayovm hahu tachat yad yiserael vatisheqot haarets shemovnim shana s
veacharayv haya shamegar ben-'anat vayakh et-pelishetim shesh-meovt ish bemalemad habaqar vayosha' gam-hu et-yiserael s
vayosifu beney yiserael la'asovt hara' be'eyney yehva veehud met
vayimekerem yehva beyad yavin melekhe-kena'an asher malakh bechatsovr vesar-tsevaov sisera vehu yovshev bacharoshet hagovyim
vayitse'aqu veney-yiserael el-yehva ki tesha' meovt rekhev-barezel lov vehu lachats et-beney yiserael bechazeqa 'eserim shana s
udevovra isha nevia eshet lapidovt hi shofeta et-yiserael ba'et hahi
vehi yovshevet tachat-tomer devovra beyn harama uveyn beyt-el behar eferayim vaya'alu eleyha beney yiserael lamishepat

vatishelach vatiqera levaraq ben-avino'am miqedesh nafetali vatomer elayv halo tsiva ׀ yehva elohey-yiserael lekh umashakheta behar tavovr velaqacheta 'imekha 'aseret alafim ish mibeney nafetali umibeney zevulun
umashakheti eleykha el-nachal qishovn et-sisera sar-tseva yavin veet-rikhebov veet-hamovnov unetatihu beyadekha
vayomer eleyha baraq im-telekhi 'imi vehalakheti veim-lo telekhi 'imi lo elekh
vatomer halokh elekh 'imakh efes ki lo tiheye tifearetekha 'al-haderekh asher ata hovlekh ki veyad-isha yimekor yehva et-sisera vataqam devovra vatelekh 'im-baraq qedesha
vayaze'eq baraq et-zevulun veet-nafetali qedesha vaya'al beragelayv 'aseret alefey ish vata'al 'imov devovra
vechever haqeyni niferad miqayin mibeney chovav choten moshe vayet aholov 'ad-elovn batse'anim kh betsa'ananim q asher et-qedesh
vayagidu lesisera ki 'ala baraq ben-avino'am har-tavovr s
vayaze'eq sisera et-kal-rikhebov tesha' meovt rekhev barezel veet-kal-ha'am asher itov mecharoshet hagovyim el-nachal qishovn
vatomer devora el-baraq qum ki ze hayovm asher natan yehva et-sisera beyadekha halo yehva yatsa lefaneykha vayered baraq mehar tavovr va'aseret alafim ish acharayv
vayaham yehva et-sisera veet-kal-harekhev veet-kal-hamachane lefi-cherev lifeney varaq vayered sisera me'al hamerekava vayanas beragelayv
uvaraq radaf acharey harekhev veacharey hamachane 'ad charoshet hagovyim vayipol kal-machane sisera lefi-cherev lo nishear 'ad-echad
vesisera nas beragelayv el-ohel ya'el eshet chever haqeyni ki shalovm beyn yavin melekhe-chatsovr uveyn beyt chever haqeyni
vatetse ya'el liqerat sisera vatomer elayv sura adoni sura elay al-tira vayasar eleyha haohela vatekhasehu basemikha
vayomer eleyha hasheqini-na me'at-mayim ki tsameti vatifetach et-novd hechalav vatasheqehu vatekhasehu
vayomer eleyha 'amod petach haohel vehaya im-ish yavov usheelekh veamar hayesh-po ish veamaret ayin
vatiqach ya'el eshet-chever et-yetad haohel vatasem et-hamaqevet beyadah vatavov elayv balat vatiteqa' et-hayated beraqatov vatitsenach baarets vehu-niredam vaya'af vayamot
vehine varaq rodef et-sisera vatetse ya'el liqeratov vatomer lov lekh veareeka et-haish asher-ata mevaqesh vayavo eleyha vehine sisera nofel met vehayated beraqatov

ki hem umiqeneyhem ya'alu veaholeyhem yavou kh uvau q khedey-arebe larov velahem veligemaleyhem eyn misepar vayavou vaarets leshachatah
vayidal yiserael meod mipeney mideyan vayize'aqu veney-yiserael el-yehva f
vayehi ki-za'aqu veney-yiserael el-yehva 'al odovt mideyan
vayishelach yehva ish navi el-beney yiserael vayomer lahem koh-amar yehva ׀ elohey yiserael anokhi he'eleyti etekhem mimitserayim vaotsi etekhem mibeyt 'avadim
vaatsil etekhem miyad mitserayim umiyad kal-lochatseykhem vaagaresh ovtam mipeneykhem vaetena lakhem et-aretsam
vaomera lakhem ani yehva eloheykhem lo tireu et-elohey haemori asher atem yovshevim bearetsam velo shema'etem beqovli f
vayavo maleakh yehva vayeshev tachat haela asher be'afera asher leyovash avi ha'ezeri vegide'ovn benov chovet chitim bagat lehanis mipeney mideyan
vayera elayv maleakh yehva vayomer elayv yehva 'imekha gibovr hechayil

vayomer elayv gide'ovn bi adoni veyesh yehva 'imanu velama metsaatenu kal-zot veaye khal-nifeleotayv asher siperu-lanu avovteynu lemor halo mimitserayim he'elanu yehva ve'ata netashanu yehva vayitenenu bekhaf-mideyan
vayifen elayv yehva vayomer lekh bekhochakha ze vehovsha'eta et-yiserael mikaf mideyan halo shelachetikha
vayomer elayv bi adonay bama ovshi'a et-yiserael hine alepi hadal bimenashe veanokhi hatsa'ir beveyt avi
vayomer elayv yehva ki eheye 'imakh vehikita et-mideyan keish echad
vayomer elayv im-na matsati chen be'eyneykha ve'asita li ovt shaata medaber 'imi
al-na tamush mize 'ad-boi eleykha vehotseti et-minechati vehinacheti lefaneykha vayomar anokhi eshev 'ad shuvekha
